body.title: Clean env/creds/device-data substrate: one secret home, .bashrc migration, debris removal, flat device layout, anthropic defunct
body.text:
# D-env-creds-device-cleanup-2026-07-03
**title:** Clean env/creds/device-data substrate before DS.0
**date:** 2026-07-03
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-consolidate-local-secrets-one-home, T-bashrc-uu-migration-finish, T-remove-env-creds-debris, T-device-data-flat-layout-standardize, T-inference-mark-anthropic-defunct, T-launcher-creds-vestigial-review, T-consequence-D-env-creds-device-cleanup

## Decision narrative
Akien 2026-07-03, part of the DS.0 course ('get DS working, deep-repair everything in the way'). The local env/creds/device-data substrate is a mess ('sonnet left a mess') and is in the way of DS.0 coming up on solid ground. On-disk findings (verified): (1) two live plaintext secrets outside the intended single home — OPENROUTER_API_KEY at ~/.bashrc:144 and GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY in ~/.unseen_university/.env — while uu_bash_profile.sh claims to be 'the ONLY plaintext secret on disk' (false); (2) an incomplete .bashrc->uu_bash_profile.sh migration (D-uu-config-identity-layer-2026-06-22) leaving #UUMOVED# debris + live AI exports; (3) debris files: uu_bash_profile.sh.pre-uu-rename.bak, a stray .env, a .kate-swp, and an unreconciled uu.env; (4) device-data dirs under ~/.unseen_university/devices/ partly flat (DickSimnel + DS.0 siblings) but inconsistent (cc_0, granny_weatherwax) — Akien wants FLAT class+instance siblings with a consistent convention (NOT nested devices/igor/IgorWild1); (5) the anthropic inference source still expects an API key but Akien is now on a 5x Max plan via browser auth (no keys, zero balance) — OpenRouter has ~$20 for later burn-testing, no top-ups.

The cleanup: consolidate ALL local secrets into one chmod-600 home (rotate the exposed OR key — Akien action), finish the .bashrc migration, remove the debris (exact-id preflight), standardize the flat device-data layout, and mark the anthropic source zero-balance/unavailable in the inference proxy. A launcher follow-on reviews superclaude's now-likely-vestigial key machinery.

## Hypothesis
After these ship: exactly ONE plaintext-secret file on disk (uu_bash_profile.sh, chmod 600) with the exposed OR key rotated; ~/.bashrc carries no AI/UU secrets or exports beyond the source line; no stray .env/.bak/.swp debris under ~/.unseen_university; devices/ uses flat class+instance sibling dirs with one consistent naming convention; and the inference router treats the anthropic source as zero-balance/unavailable (never selects it) while OpenRouter stays available-but-finite.

## Measurement Signal
`grep -rE 'sk-or-|_API_KEY=' ~/.bashrc ~/.unseen_university/.env` returns nothing; `ls ~/.unseen_university/*.bak ~/.unseen_university/.env` -> not found; `ls ~/.unseen_university/devices/` shows flat class+instance siblings in one convention; the inference router logs skip anthropic as unavailable and still resolves a capable source for each tier; a fresh interactive shell + a device start still work post-migration.

## Intention
I intend that the local environment, credentials, and device-data layout are clean and single-homed — one plaintext-secret file, no scattered keys or debris, flat traversable device dirs, and an inference layer that correctly reflects paid Anthropic is off — so DS.0 comes up on a solid, comprehensible substrate. Serves the overarching DS.0 course: deep-repair everything in the way, do it right.
